heading: Establishment; statement of purposes
label: 79a Establishment; statement of purposes
text: In order to preserve significant examples of the primeval coastal redwood (Sequoia sempervirens) forests and the streams and seashores with which they are associated for purposes of public inspiration, enjoyment, and scientific study, there is hereby established a Redwood National Park in Del Norte and Humboldt Counties, California.
notes: Short Title of 2005 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–131, title III, § 301119 Stat. 2569Dec. 20, 2005“This title [amending ] may be cited as the ‘Redwood National Park Boundary Adjustment Act of 2005’.”section 79b of this title
